title: erigeron wilkenii
intro: Erigeron wilkenii, also known as Wilken's fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Erigeron wilkenii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Erigeron wilkenii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
